articles.description: Producer Venkat Narayana said Jana Nayagan, starring Vijay and directed by H Vinoth, may release within two weeks after CBFC clearance. The action drama has drawn attention amid Vijay's political transition in Tamil Nadu. ahead of May.

articles.title: 14 police officers killed in Pakistan after car bomb destroys outpost, militants launch ambush
Security Scare In Bengaluru Ahead Of PM Modi Visit After Explosives Recovery | Watch
articles.description: A major security scare emerged in Bengaluru ahead of Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s visit after two gelatine sticks were recovered near the event venue during a security check. Police said the explosives were found nearly three kilometres away from the main site, prompting an immediate investigation and heightened surveillance. The development comes amid nationwide security alerts following intelligence inputs regarding a possible terror threat, with authorities increasing vigilance across sensitive locations in Delhi and Bengaluru. Watch

articles.description: CITU Kollam threatens protests against the ousting of contract workers, calling actions inhumane and politically motivated.

articles.title: Structural, safety audits underway after Vikramshila Setu slab collapse
articles.description: In a significant setback, part of the Vikramshila Setu in Bhagalpur crumbled, leading to an immediate response from structural engineers at BRO, IIT Patna, and local authorities. Aerial drone surveys are currently in progress to evaluate the extent of the damage as plans are underway for a provisional Bailey bridge suitable for light traffic.

articles.title: ‘A parasitic party’: PM Modi targets Congress over DMK fallout, says it is latching onto Vijay’s TVK in Tamil Nadu
articles.description: At a rally in Bengaluru, PM Modi used the recent BJP electoral wins to contrast "pro-incumbency" with the Congress’s history of losing states, and attacked the party's "power-hungry" politics in Tamil Nadu.

articles.title: Vivek Oberoi celebrates mother, wife and sister in heartfelt Mother’s Day tribute
articles.description: Actor Vivek Oberoi honored the women who shape future generations this Mother's Day. He lauded his mother for her unwavering strength, his wife Priyanka for nurturing their children, and his sister Meghna for embodying their mother's grace. Oberoi expressed profound gratitude for the women who have influenced his life and are building the next generation with love and resilience.

articles.title: Prohibitory orders clamped in Kadapa after clashes over Almaspet junction naming
articles.description: Section 144 imposed in Kadapa after stone-pelting at Almaspet junction over the naming of a centre. The Collector and SP termed the clashes unfortunate.

articles.title: ‘Love Island USA’ Carsten Bergersen and Taylor Nicole Smith officially engaged: ‘My mission with my proposal was....’
articles.description: In an enchanting moment fit for a fairytale, Love Island USA's Carsten 'Bergie' Bergersen popped the big question to Taylor Nicole Smith during a picturesque outing at Signor Vineyards in Fredericksburg, Texas. The proposal, which took place on May 3rd, was the culmination of Bergie's meticulous six-month planning.

articles.title: Hantavirus Alert: India’s Union Health Ministry activates precautionary surveillance; what travellers need to know
articles.description: India's Health Ministry has activated surveillance following hantavirus cases on the MV Hondius cruise ship, with eight probable infections and three deaths reported. While the WHO assesses the global risk as low, two asymptomatic Indian nationals are onboard. Travelers to South America are advised to take precautions against rodent exposure.

articles.description: Virus Surveillance: Dr Ishwar Gilada explains why better surveillance, sanitation, and awareness are crucial to mitigating hantavirus risks in India. While not presently a threat, climate and urban factors could raise future risk factors.

articles.title: Third leopard sighting in 7 weeks Raheja Heights
articles.description: A leopard was first spotted inside Raheja Heights on March 17, when CCTV footage captured the animal entering the parking lot and killing a stray dog. A second sighting inside the complex was reported on April 8 at 3am, when the big cat was captured on CCTV trying to take away another dog

articles.title: Mother’s Day: What is Janani? All about India’s new maternal and child healthcare digital push
articles.description: The platform was unveiled during the National Summit on Innovation and Inclusivity and is being positioned as an upgraded version of the government’s existing Reproductive and Child Health (RCH) portal.

articles.title: ‘Missiles, drones locked on US targets’: Iran warns of ‘heavy assault’ after tanker strikes in Gulf of Oman
articles.description: Iran's IRGC has warned of a "heavy assault" on US military assets and ships if Iranian oil tankers or commercial vessels are attacked in the Strait of Hormuz. This follows US forces disabling two Iranian oil tankers in the Gulf of Oman and an earlier exchange of fire near the strait.

articles.title: Vijay sworn in as Tamil Nadu CM: What did TVK promise ahead of Assembly polls
articles.description: Tamil actor Vijay's party, Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam, has taken charge as Tamil Nadu's new government. Vijay is now the Chief Minister. The party secured a significant victory in the state assembly elections. Their manifesto promised extensive welfare schemes for women, job opportunities for youth, and reforms in governance. This marks a major shift in Tamil Nadu's political landscape.

articles.title: ‘We’ll fight this battle': Mamata Banerjee urges Opposition to form ‘joint platform’ against BJP
articles.description: Mamata Banerjee had earlier refused to resign from the CM’s post even after BJP swept the assembly polls winning 207 out of 294 seats.
